home.hero.title: Learn faster with a tutor who fits you.
home.hero.subtitle: Match with verified tutors, book sessions in seconds, and track real progress — for students, parents, and educators.
home.card.subject: Mathematics · High school
home.features.title: A complete platform for learning
home.features.subtitle: From discovery to booking to progress — built for students, families, and tutors.
home.feat.search.d: Filter by subject, grade, language, and availability to find the right match.
home.feat.verified.d: Every tutor is reviewed and verified before they can be booked.
home.feat.book.d: See live availability and confirm a session in seconds.
home.feat.learn.d: Structured courses, homework, and assessments that track real growth.
home.feat.family.d: Parents can link children, oversee learning, and stay in control.
home.feat.ai.d: Personalised suggestions that help every learner move forward.
home.how.title: Start learning in three steps
home.step1.d: Pick your role, subject, and grade level — it takes a minute.
home.step2.d: Browse verified tutors and choose the one that fits you best.
home.step3.d: Schedule sessions, join online, and track your progress over time.
home.subjects.title: Popular subjects
home.subjects.subtitle: Support across the subjects that matter most.
home.cta.title: Ready to start learning?
home.cta.subtitle: Create a free account and find your tutor today.
footer.tagline: A modern, multi-language platform connecting students, parents, and verified tutors.

home.programs.title: Programs designed around your needs
home.programs.subtitle: Choose a path — we'll match you with the right tutor in under a minute.
prog.school.d: Ongoing help with schoolwork — structured support so students stay on top of homework and reach better results.
prog.lang.d: Build strong reading, writing, and speaking skills in Arabic or English, matched to each learner's level.
prog.exam.d: Focused, intensive sessions that target exactly what the exam needs — with a plan and measurable progress.

kids.childId.hint: Ask your child to open their dashboard and copy the link code shown there, then paste it here.
kids.error: Could not link. Check the ID and try again.
kids.empty.d: Link your child's account above to follow their learning.
kids.pendingNote: This link is awaiting approval. Monitoring unlocks once it's active.
kids.myCode.d: Share this code with your parent so they can connect to your account and follow your progress.
kids.err.exists: This child is already linked to your account — see the list below.
kids.err.self: That's your own link code. Paste your child's code instead.
kids.err.notfound: No student found with that code. Ask your child to open their dashboard and copy the exact code.
kids.err.invalid: That doesn't look like a valid link code. Copy it again from your child's dashboard.
